name: Digging Master
author: Poki
description: Digging Master is a simulation game that invites you to embark on an archaeological adventure, where you can discover ancient artifacts and build your own museum! Dig through the soil to uncover fascinating fossils like Triceratops, T-Rex, and Stegosaurus. Assemble these majestic creatures and showcase them in your museum to attract visitors. Sell tickets to guests and earn money to expand your museum further. Invest in upgrades to dig faster and discover rarer artifacts, or hire workers to assist you in your quest. Are you prepared to become the ultimate Digging Master? How to play Digging Master? Move: WASD, arrow keys, or drag your mouse around! Who created Digging Master? Digging Master is created by NoPowerup. Play their other games on Poki: Idle Gang , Survival Builder , Idle Tree City , Idle Digging Tycoon , Idle Lumber Inc , Idle Light City , Idle Success , Horse Shoeing , Merge Battle , ShootZ , FlowZ , and Traffic Rush! ! How can I play Digging Master for free? You can play Digging Master for free on Poki. Can I play Digging Master on mobile devices and desktop? Digging Master can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
